query: SELECT p.id, p.name, c.name as categoria, p.images FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210001 AND p.images IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.sortOrder, p.sortOrder;
